assignments.description: Assign updates made to the Business Issue assessment fields.
assignments.name: BI_assessment_updates
assignments.label: BI assessment updates

assignments.description: Assign updates made to the leader notes assessment fields. {!Current_Assessment.BI_Leader_Notes__c}
assignments.name: Manager_Notes_assessment_updates
assignments.label: Manager Notes assessment updates

assignments.description: Assign updates made to the "Plan" assessment fields.
assignments.name: Plan_assessment_updates
assignments.label: Plan assessment updates

assignments.description: Assign updates made to the "Power" assessment fields.
assignments.name: Power_assessment_updates
assignments.label: Power assessment updates

assignments.description: Assign updates made to the "Value" assessment fields.
assignments.name: Value_assessment_updates
assignments.label: Value assessment updates

decisions.description: null check if there is a current assessment or not.
decisions.name: Flag_Current_Assessment_Exists
decisions.label: Flag - Current Assessment Exists

decisions.description: determine if the running user has the custom permission to manage assessment manager notes.
decisions.name: Switch_Permission_To_Read_Manager_Notes
decisions.label: Switch - Permission To Read Manager Notes

decisions.description: determine if the running user has the custom permission to manage assessment manager notes.
decisions.name: Switch_Permission_To_Update_Manager_Notes
decisions.label: Switch - Permission To Update Manager Notes

Flow.description: +3/5/26 ZMH: Updated the Leader Notes fields to be visible to everyone but editable only to users with customer permissions to edit. +12/17/25 ZMH: Added Business Problem and Business Solution to Business Issue section. +9/8/25 ZMH: Updated Leader Note assignment and added update record for manager note fields. +8/29/25 ZMH: Added visiblity filter to leadership note fields on the opportunity assessment screen. +8/26/25 ZMH: Removed the Opportunity Owner assignment when creating an Assessment record. +8/22/25 ZMH: Updated Owner assignment for manually created assessments. The owner is now the running user instead of the opportunity owner.
Flow.label: Current Assessment - Update Screen

fields.name: No_Assessment_Message
fields.fieldText:
***Opportunity Assessment Not Found***


An Opportunity Assessment record does not exist for this opportunity. Please click the button to the right to start a new assessment.

fields.name: Update_Confirmed_Message
fields.fieldText:
Assessment Saved! 🥳


Great work! Your updates have been saved and the Opportunity Assessment is up to date.


Click Done to close this screen.

screens.name: Update_Opportunity_Assessment_Screen
screens.label: Opportunity Assessment

value.stringValue: Is there a defined Business Issue?
Is it really a Business Issue or a Problem, Solution, Project, or Initiative?
Did you introduce problems that align to our differentiated solution
Would your prospect say that any of our solution requirements are differentiated?
Did the prospect confirm their Business Issue, Problems, and Solution in writing?
Was their Business Value quantified by your prospect?
Did your prospect confirm their Business Value in writing?
Was Personal Value stated by your prospect?
Do we understand their decision-making process?
Have they made a decision the size of this opportunity before?
Does the purchase price logically fit the prospect’s authority level?
Do we have access to Power?
Can we bargain for access based upon Plan requirements?
Has the EB agreed to a written Mutual Plan?
Are there logical checkpoints for EB review/meetings
If the Plan is with a Champion, does it include access to Power?
Is there a commitment to do business?
Is the Plan confirmed in writing?

screens.helpText:
Please review and complete the fields below with the most current information for this opportunity.

When you are finished, click the Update button to save your changes.
